'''ân-s-s''' ('''kanasas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:headshot|headshot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-s-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headshot|headshot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-s-s
|-
! Lemma
| kanasas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinasas|thinasas]] || [[word:jinasas|jinasas]] || [[word:shinasas|shinasas]] || [[word:kinasas|kinasas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunasas|thuthunasas]] || [[word:jujunasas|jujunasas]] || [[word:shushunasas|shushunasas]] || [[word:kukunasas|kukunasas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunasas|thunasas]] || [[word:junasas|junasas]] || [[word:shunasas|shunasas]] || [[word:kunasas|kunasas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunasas|thunasas]] || [[word:junasas|junasas]] || [[word:shunasas|shunasas]] || [[word:kunasas|kunasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenasas|thenasas]] || [[word:jenasas|jenasas]] || [[word:shenasas|shenasas]] || [[word:kenasas|kenasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonasas|thothonasas]] || [[word:jojonasas|jojonasas]] || [[word:shoshonasas|shoshonasas]] || [[word:kokonasas|kokonasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonasas|thonasas]] || [[word:jonasas|jonasas]] || [[word:shonasas|shonasas]] || [[word:konasas|konasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonasas|thonasas]] || [[word:jonasas|jonasas]] || [[word:shonasas|shonasas]] || [[word:konasas|konasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚnasas|thĂŚnasas]] || [[word:jĂŚnasas|jĂŚnasas]] || [[word:shĂŚnasas|shĂŚnasas]] || [[word:kĂŚnasas|kĂŚnasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanasas|thathanasas]] || [[word:jajanasas|jajanasas]] || [[word:shashanasas|shashanasas]] || [[word:kakanasas|kakanasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanasas|thanasas]] || [[word:janasas|janasas]] || [[word:shanasas|shanasas]] || [[word:kanasas|kanasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanasas|thanasas]] || [[word:janasas|janasas]] || [[word:shanasas|shanasas]] || [[word:kanasas|kanasas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanasas|shanasas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanasas|goshanasas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanasas|gokishanasas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanasasnĂź|shanasasnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanasasnknĂź|goshanasasnknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanasasnĂź|gokishanasasnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanasashĂŤ|shanasashĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanasasnkshĂŤ|goshanasasnkshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanasashĂŤ|gokishanasashĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanasasro|shanasasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanasasnkro|goshanasasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanasasro|gokishanasasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanasasmu|shanasasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanasasnkmu|goshanasasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanasasmu|gokishanasasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanasasher|shanasasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanasasnksher|goshanasasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanasasher|gokishanasasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanasasng|shanasasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanasasnkng|goshanasasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanasasng|gokishanasasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanasasya|shanasasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanasasnkya|goshanasasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanasasya|gokishanasasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanasasyam|shanasasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanasasnkyam|goshanasasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanasasyam|gokishanasasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanasasnĂźshĂŤ|shanasasnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanasasnknĂźshĂŤ|goshanasasnknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanasasnĂźshĂŤ|gokishanasasnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanasasnĂźro|shanasasnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanasasnknĂźro|goshanasasnknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanasasnĂźro|gokishanasasnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanasasnĂźmu|shanasasnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanasasnknĂźmu|goshanasasnknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanasasnĂźmu|gokishanasasnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanasashĂŤnĂź|shanasashĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanasasnkshĂŤnĂź|goshanasasnkshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanasashĂŤnĂź|gokishanasashĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanasashĂŤro|shanasashĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanasasnkshĂŤro|goshanasasnkshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanasashĂŤro|gokishanasashĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanasashĂŤmu|shanasashĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanasasnkshĂŤmu|goshanasasnkshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanasashĂŤmu|gokishanasashĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanasasronĂź|shanasasronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanasasnkronĂź|goshanasasnkronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanasasronĂź|gokishanasasronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanasasroshĂŤ|shanasasroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanasasnkroshĂŤ|goshanasasnkroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanasasroshĂŤ|gokishanasasroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanasasromu|shanasasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanasasnkromu|goshanasasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanasasromu|gokishanasasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanasasmunĂź|shanasasmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanasasnkmunĂź|goshanasasnkmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanasasmunĂź|gokishanasasmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanasasmushĂŤ|shanasasmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanasasnkmushĂŤ|goshanasasnkmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanasasmushĂŤ|gokishanasasmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanasasmuro|shanasasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanasasnkmuro|goshanasasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanasasmuro|gokishanasasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
